notes: Corrected documentation so the replaceable app folder is Documents\Pathmark and the default Workspace is Documents\Workspace.
Kept the public Streamlit page as a download homepage only, with no local app or launcher code rendered on the page.
Improved imported Area colour assignment so active numbered Areas are spread across Google Calendar colours where possible.
Removed top-of-page setup/debug text from the public release hub and checked the hosted page contains no local workspace code snippets.
